SHADOWFALL-BLEED_POWER.title: Bleed
SHADOWFALL-BLEED_POWER.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, lose 6 HP, then Bleed decreases by 1.
SHADOWFALL-BLEED_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever a card is Exhausted, lose [blue]{Damage}[/blue] HP, then reduce [gold]Bleed[/gold] by 1.
SHADOWFALL-INSTINCT_POWER.title: Instinct
SHADOWFALL-INSTINCT_POWER.description: Increases the HP loss caused by Bleed.
SHADOWFALL-INSTINCT_POWER.smartDescripti: Increases the HP loss caused by [gold]Bleed[/gold] by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
SHADOWFALL-INFECTED_SHOT_POWER.descripti: The next time you exhaust a [gold]Void[/gold], the target loses HP.
